# reference-patterns

> Personal reference of implementation and testing patterns across languages.
> Each pattern is a self-contained, runnable example documented in its PATTERN.md.

## Fullstack

- [connect-protovalidate-tanstack](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/fullstack/rpc/connect-protovalidate-tanstack/PATTERN.md): End-to-end typed RPC with validation — Go Connect server enforcing protovalidate rules declared in the proto, React front with TanStack Form (writes) and TanStack Query over HTTP GET (cacheable reads), tested on both sides without a network

## Go

- [table-driven-tests](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/go/testing/table-driven-tests/PATTERN.md): Idiomatic Go table-driven tests — named map cases, parallel subtests, t.Helper assertion helpers

## Protobuf

- [buf-setup](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/protobuf/buf-setup/PATTERN.md): Minimal buf v2 setup — module layout, STANDARD lint, breaking-change detection, remote-plugin codegen

## TypeScript

- [pnpm-turbo-structure](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/typescript/monorepo/pnpm-turbo-structure/PATTERN.md): How to structure a pnpm + Turborepo monorepo — apps/packages/tooling split, shared configs as packages, task graph
- [react-call-confirm](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/typescript/react/react-call-confirm/PATTERN.md): Awaitable UI with react-call — a Confirm dialog you await like a function, and how to test promise-resolving components with Testing Library
- [vitest-unit-mocking](https://github.com/Skayfa/reference-patterns/blob/main/typescript/testing/vitest-unit-mocking/PATTERN.md): Unit testing with Vitest — module mocks (vi.mock), injected mocks (vi.fn), fixture builders and fake timers
